retrieved_result: Upgrade in Progress Upgrade in Progress In order to improve the resilience, security and performance of our systems, we are carrying out important, major upgrades on Saturday the 25 th and Sunday 26 th of November. There will be site outages during this time. We apologise for the inconvenience.
Decision_Reason: The content is about upgrade notices/outages and not related to Docker setup, beginners guidance, or relevant Docker content.
